settings.block_des: Explore our collection of essential accessories designed to meet the needs of any salon or spa. From applicator sticks and waxing strips to pre- and post-wax treatments, Bombshell Wax provides professional-grade tools that ensure a seamless waxing experience for both clients and estheticians. We offer durable wax cartridges, gentle skin cleansers, gloves and gauze, calming post-wax oils, and precision spatulas and stirrers, all crafted to complement our high-quality waxes. These accessories are chosen to help create a comfortable, efficient, and effective waxing process. Equip your spa with the best in waxing essentials for a flawless service, every time.

settings.block_title_question: What accessories do I need for waxing?
settings.block_description_question:
What accessories do I need for waxing?
-Wax
-Wax warmer
-Wax applicators
-Disposable Gloves
-Wax strips (if using soft wax)
-Pre wax treatments (lotions, oils, powders)
-Post wax treatment (lotions, oils)
-Wax cleaner
-Tweezers
-Cotton pads or gauze

No double dipping! We do not recommend reusing spatulas or applicators due to hygiene and safety concerns. Reusing spatulas can lead to cross-contamination, increasing the risk of spreading bacteria. For best practices use a new spatula for each dip into the wax and dispose each after use.

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.
